S.text: Glaucoma follow-up for POAG OU on latanoprost qHS plus dorzolamide BID OU.
Reports full adherence to both drops, no missed doses.
Tolerable bitter taste from dorzolamide; denies new vision problems.

O.text: IOP 15 mmHg OD / 16 mmHg OS (GAT); untreated baseline 31/30.
Optic nerves: C/D 0.8 OU, advanced but stable vs baseline, no disc hemorrhages.
HVF 24-2: dense inferior arcuate defect each eye, stable, no progression vs 6 months ago.
OCT RNFL: thin but unchanged, no new thinning.

A.text: Advanced primary open-angle glaucoma OU, stable at low target IOP on two agents.

P.text: Continue latanoprost qHS and dorzolamide BID OU, no change; reinforce adherence.
RTC 3 months for IOP check; repeat HVF and OCT RNFL in 6 months given advanced disease.
